Overview (AMZN)
AMZN - Amazon.Com Inc
Market: stocks | Exchange: XNAS
Listed: 1997-05-15
Market cap: 2,563,598,543,846
Employees: 1,576,000
Industry: RETAIL-CATALOG & MAIL-ORDER HOUSES
About: Amazon is the leading online retailer and marketplace for third party sellers. Retail related revenue represents approximately 74% of total, followed by Amazon Web Services (17%), and advertising services (9%). International segments constitute 22% of Amazon's total revenue, led by Germany, the United Kingdom, and Japan.

Looking at Amazon.Com Inc (AMZN) and Walmart Inc. Common Stock (WMT), both names carry the usual large-cap market risk, but the current signals suggest different short-term risk profiles. For WMT, the key issues are Large-cap stocks can still be sensitive to broad market drawdowns.; Recent realized volatility is relatively low versus many growth names.. Over the recent 30-day window, AMZN has been more volatile, at about 33.81% annualized realized volatility, versus 24.92% for WMT.

In plain terms, one may currently show sharper short-term swings while the other looks relatively steadier. This is an informational comparison based on fetched data only, not investment advice.
